childhood.familyBackground: Born as the third son of Cho Seok-rae, honorary chairman of Hyosung Group. Part of the Hyosung chaebol family, third-generation heir. His grandfather was the founder of Hyosung, and his father built it into a major industrial conglomerate.
childhood.education: Graduated from Gyeonggi Elementary School, Cheongwoon Middle School, and Gyeongbok High School (65th class). Earned a bachelor's degree in economics from Brown University in the United States.
childhood.earlyLife: Growing up as the youngest of three brothers in one of Korea's prominent business families, Cho was educated at elite Korean schools before attending Brown University. His older brothers are Cho Hyun-jun (current Hyosung Group chairman) and Cho Hyun-moon.
childhood.familyBackgroundKo: 효성그룹 조석래 명예회장의 3남으로 태어남. 효성 재벌가의 3세 후계자. 조부가 효성의 창업주이며, 아버지가 이를 주요 산업 대기업으로 키움.
childhood.educationKo: 경기초등학교, 청운중학교, 경복고등학교(65회) 졸업. 미국 브라운대학교 경제학과 졸업.
childhood.earlyLifeKo: 한국의 대표적 기업 가문에서 삼형제 중 막내로 성장, 한국 명문 학교를 거쳐 브라운대학교에 진학. 형들은 조현준(현 효성그룹 회장)과 조현문.

careerTimeline.event: Graduated from Brown University with a degree in Economics
Started career at Bain & Company management consulting, then worked at NTT Communications in Japan on wireless strategy projects and helped establish its Korean branch
careerTimeline.eventKo: 베인앤컴퍼니 경영 컨설팅에서 커리어 시작, 이후 일본 NTT커뮤니케이션에서 유무선 전략 프로젝트 수행 및 한국지사 설립에 참여

careerTimeline.event: Married renowned violist Kim Yu-young, a graduate of Juilliard and Yale
careerTimeline.eventKo: 줄리아드와 예일 출신의 유명 비올리스트 김유영과 결혼

careerTimeline.event: Promoted to Vice Chairman and Chief Operating Officer (COO) of Hyosung
Appointed CEO of HS Hyosung, preparing for independent management of the newly established holding company
careerTimeline.eventKo: HS효성 대표이사로 선임, 신설 지주사를 통한 독립경영 준비

personalTraits.knownFor: Third-generation Hyosung Group heir and Vice Chairman of HS Hyosung. The youngest of three sons of Cho Seok-rae, he is preparing for independent management through the newly established HS Hyosung holding company. Known for his international background with education at Brown University and career experience at Bain & Company and NTT Communications in Japan. Currently serves as COO of Hyosung and sits on boards of Hyosung Advanced Materials and Hyosung Information Systems.
personalTraits.knownForKo: 효성그룹 3세 후계자이자 HS효성 부회장. 조석래의 삼형제 중 막내로, 신설 지주사 HS효성을 통한 독립경영을 준비 중. 브라운대학교 학력과 베인앤컴퍼니, 일본 NTT커뮤니케이션 등의 국제적 경력으로 유명. 현재 효성 COO로서 효성첨단소재, 효성인포메이션시스템 사내이사도 겸임.
